message.content:
@startuml
!theme base

package "security" as security {
  package "auth" as auth {
    [@Roles] as roles
    type Role = 'ADMIN' | 'MITARBEITER' | 'KUNDE' as roleType
    roles --> roleType
  }
}

package "auto" as auto {
  package "entity" as entity {
    [C] "«entity»" as entityAuto
    Auto as autoEntity
    entityAuto --> autoEntity
  }

  package "rest" as rest {
    [C] "«control»" as controlAutoWrite
    «@Controller()» as controllerDecorator
    «@UseGuards()» as guardsDecorator
    «@UseInterceptors()» as interceptorsDecorator
    AutoWriteController as autoWriteController
    controlAutoWrite --> controllerDecorator
    controlAutoWrite --> guardsDecorator
    controlAutoWrite --> interceptorsDecorator
    controlAutoWrite --> autoWriteController

    [C] "«control»" as controlAutoWriteService
    AutoWriteService as autoWriteService
    controlAutoWriteService --> autoWriteService

    [C] "«control»" as controlAutoReadService
    AutoReadService as autoReadService
    controlAutoReadService --> autoReadService

    @Post() @Roles() async create(@Body() auto: Auto, @Req() req: Request, @Res() res: Response): Promise<Response> as postCreate
    @Put() @Roles() async update(@Body() auto: Auto, @Param() id: string, @Headers() version: string, @Res() res: Response): Promise<Response> as putUpdate
    @Delete() @Roles() async delete(@Param() id: string, @Res() res: Response): Promise<Response> as deleteDelete
    postCreate --> autoWriteController
    putUpdate --> autoWriteController
    deleteDelete --> autoWriteController
  }

  package "service" as service {
    [C] "«control»" as controlAutoWriteService
    AutoWriteService as autoWriteService
    controlAutoWriteService --> autoWriteService

    [C] "«control»" as controlAutoReadService
    AutoReadService as autoReadService
    controlAutoReadService --> autoReadService
  }
}

package "express" as express {
  [C] "Request" as request
  [C] "Response" as response
}

package "@nestjs/common" as nestjsCommon {
  @Controller as controllerDecorator
  @UseGuards as guardsDecorator
  @UseInterceptors as interceptorsDecorator
  @Post as postDecorator
  @Put as putDecorator
  @Delete as deleteDecorator
  @Req as reqDecorator
  @Res as resDecorator
  @Param as paramDecorator
  @Body as bodyDecorator
  @Headers as headersDecorator
}

roles --> controllerDecorator
roles --> autoWriteController
roles --> autoWriteService
roles --> autoReadService
roles --> request
roles --> response
roles --> controllerDecorator
roles --> guardsDecorator
roles --> interceptorsDecorator
roles --> postDecorator
roles --> putDecorator
roles --> deleteDecorator
roles --> reqDecorator
roles --> resDecorator
roles --> paramDecorator
roles --> bodyDecorator
roles --> headersDecorator

entityAuto --> autoWriteController
entityAuto --> autoWriteService
entityAuto --> autoReadService

autoWriteController --> request
autoWriteController --> response
autoWriteController --> controllerDecorator
autoWriteController --> guardsDecorator
autoWriteController --> interceptorsDecorator
autoWriteController --> postDecorator
autoWriteController --> putDecorator
autoWriteController --> deleteDecorator
autoWriteController --> reqDecorator
autoWriteController --> resDecorator
autoWriteController --> paramDecorator
autoWriteController --> bodyDecorator
autoWriteController --> headersDecorator

autoWriteService --> request
autoWriteService --> response
autoWriteService --> controllerDecorator
autoWriteService --> guardsDecorator
autoWriteService --> interceptorsDecorator
autoWriteService --> postDecorator
autoWriteService --> putDecorator
autoWriteService --> deleteDecorator
autoWriteService --> reqDecorator
autoWriteService --> resDecorator
autoWriteService --> paramDecorator
autoWriteService --> bodyDecorator
autoWriteService --> headersDecorator

autoReadService --> request
autoReadService --> response
autoReadService --> controllerDecorator
autoReadService --> guardsDecorator
autoReadService --> interceptorsDecorator
autoReadService --> postDecorator
autoReadService --> putDecorator
autoReadService --> deleteDecorator
autoReadService --> reqDecorator
autoReadService --> resDecorator
autoReadService --> paramDecorator
autoReadService --> bodyDecorator
autoReadService --> headersDecorator

request --> Promise
response --> Promise

Promise as promise
[C] "I" as interfacePromise
interfacePromise --> promise

@enduml
